section.heading: Investments of stock required by treaties

content.p: All investments of stock, that are or may be required by treaties with the Indians, shall be made under the direction of the President; and special accounts of the funds under such treaties shall be kept at the Treasury, and statements thereof be annually laid before Congress.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: R.S. § 2095 derived from act Jan. 9, 1837, ch. 1, § 3, 5 Stat. 135.
